patch.value: MCP narrow tools silently drop top-level filter keys (pm_list {type:Task} returns unfiltered)

agent-UX audit F7: optionsWithAuthor reads only args.options, so the obvious agent shape pm_list {type:'Task'} returns ALL items (a stderr/warnings note is added but the result is wrong-sized). Hoist recognized filter keys (status/type/tag/priority/limit) from top-level into options. Complements [[pm-rmjy]].
